description: Created for the woman of sophistication, this sandal from catwalk is crafted with high quality material to offer unparalleled comfort and is uniquely designed to give your feet that urban touche. Heel: 1.5" Upper Synthetic leather upper with a covered toe Slip on style for ease of wear Synthetic leather lined footbed ergonomically curved to offer maximum comfort Outsole TPR outsole with herrringbone grooves on the forefoot and textured under the toe and heel patch for grip Brand badge for style Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
